command.title: Command Center
command.subtitle: Full business health. One screen. E-commerce + brand stores only.

ads.subtitle: Meta campaigns — spend and ROAS in USD, never mixed with GEL.

discount.subtitle: Margin-guarded promo calculator. 40% floor, 25% cap — enforced, not suggested.

products.subtitle: Revenue, margin, retention — per category and per SKU.

customers.subtitle: Segments, churn risk, lifecycle — rule-based RFM + Claude scoring.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.subtitle: Telegram + in-app signals. Written to the alerts table before sending.

promo.title: Promo calculator

promo.noDiscountNote: Champions, Capsule Loyalists and Flavour Explorers never receive discounts — early access only.
